# Feature: sync / doc-bundle includes reviews (+ runtime artifacts)

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-17 -->

## Intent
`autoguide sync` / bundle copies all artifacts the React runtime needs so Widget matches CLI (esp. `reviews.json`). Generic — no browo hardcodes.

## Preconditions
- Scan produces `.autoguide/` including optional `reviews.json`
- Client loader expects `reviews.json` / `review-history.json`

## Happy Path
- [ ] sync includes `reviews.json` (and `review-history.json` when present)
- [ ] Document full runtime artifact list (INTEGRATION / sync constant)
- [ ] Tests: sync copies reviews; loader can see review pending when present
- [ ] No secrets; German errors if any
- [ ] doc-bundle `runtimeArtifacts` lists reviews

## Edge Cases
- [ ] Missing reviews.json → German skip warning, other files still sync
- [ ] `--clean` still works

## Regression
- [ ] Existing sync tests pass
- [ ] Vite plugin still copies all `.json` (unchanged)

## Assumptions
- review-history.json is also a runtime artifact for Review panel history

## Implementation Notes
- `packages/cli/src/commands/sync.ts` — RUNTIME_ARTIFACTS includes reviews.json + review-history.json
- `packages/cli/src/commands/generate.ts` — doc-bundle runtimeArtifacts updated
- Docs: INTEGRATION.md + README
- Tests: sync copies reviews; client loads pending reviews
